description_long: This is a heavy-duty, industrial-style stapler with a robust blue metal body and a prominent silver-gray handle. The handle is elongated and ergonomically angled, designed for comfortable pressing, and is attached to the main body with a visible hinge mechanism. The stapler features a rectangular base with rounded edges and a large open slot for inserting paper, as well as a visible staple exit slot at the front. The side panels are reinforced with metallic plates, and there are several screws and fasteners visible, indicating a sturdy construction. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for use in offices, workshops, or urban maintenance settings. No visible brand logo or rubber grip is present on the base.
description: A robust blue and silver-gray metal stapler with an ergonomic handle and reinforced side panels, designed for heavy-duty use. The design is utilitarian and durable, with visible fasteners and a large paper slot.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the elongated handle and the narrow width of the stapler, with the staple exit slot partially visible at the far end.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue metal body, silver-gray handle, and the hinge mechanism, with the open slot for paper and staple exit slot clearly visible.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the blue base and the overall slim profile, with the handle and hinge structure visible from above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the handle, hinge, and blue body, but from the other side, with the staple exit slot at the right end.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is elongated, angular, and slightly contoured for ergonomic pressing, with a smooth matte gray finish. It appears to be made of hard plastic or coated metal, with no visible texturing or grip pattern.
attribute_metal_hinge_mechanism: The metal hinge mechanism is located at the rear upper corner, connecting the handle to the main body. It consists of a visible cylindrical pin and metallic plates secured with screws, allowing the handle to pivot smoothly.
attribute_staple_exit_slot: The staple exit slot is positioned at the front end of the stapler, rectangular in shape, and clearly visible in the side views. It is surrounded by the metallic base and is the point where staples are ejected.
